task: Produce a launch-quality sepsis alert drift monitoring packet using only the embedded packet. Compute record-level margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3). Flag records with negative margin as FAIL and margin < 8% of the largest driver as WARN. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Deliver a reproducible workbook or script (sepsis_alert_drift.xlsx) that preserves intermediate calculations and formulas/executable logic, plus an expert-review memo (cds_action.md) containing record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes (including sensitivity_shift_pct), final recommendation table deciding recalibration versus workflow fix, and cost justification within the decision_budget_usd. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions.
